pages.title: Welcome! | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Main landing page for Blockchain Web Services API documentation. Introduces BWS platform APIs (IPFS, Blockchain Save/Hash, NFT.zK) and marketplace solutions (Blockchain Badges, NFT Game Cube, ESG Credits, X Bot). Explains the BWS Developer Grants program offering bounty payments, recognition, and API fees in $BWS tokens.
useCases: Store data on blockchain with Certificate of Trust
Upload images and JSON files to IPFS network
Create NFTs for non-blockchain-expert users
Issue digital credentials on blockchain
Enable sports fans to own digital assets tied to field sections
Provide ESG impact reporting for financial institutions

Developer Grants Quick Start Platform Fees API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Platform API Marketplace Solutions BWS Developer Grants Was this helpful? Copy Welcome! Blockchain Web Services documentation. Blockchain Web Services (aka BWS) aims to transform the blockchain market by making innovative solutions accessible to a broad audience, including those without technical or Web3 experience. Read Blockchain Web Services's White Paper . NFT Game Cube's new marketplace solution launch! BWS’s NFT Game Cube lets sports fans own digital assets tied to specific sections of a sports field—not only football but chess, tennis, cricket, and many more. As real-time events unfold at their location during the game, fans earn points, unlocking exciting rewards while creating a new revenue stream for sports clubs, former athletes, influencers, and anyone with a market in the sports industry. Read the Launch Pitch . Platform API By leveraging the Blockchain Web Services API, developers can seamlessly integrate blockchain technology into their offerings, providing their target customers with blockchain innovative solutions without requiring Web3 expertise. Blockchain Save Easily and affordably store data on the blockchain while receiving a Certificate of Trust for enhanced transparency. Blockchain Hash A single API call to save data to the blockchain without passing your wallet or managing the transaction fees. IPFS Effortlessly upload images and JSON files to the IPFS network and use our IPFS gateway for reliable access. NFT.zk This solution is designed to create NFTs easily but also to transfer the ownership to non-blockchain-experts users that will now be able to experience the NFT revolution too. Marketplace Solutions Blockchain Web Services is not just an API but a set of platform protocols and development practices to enable the community to contribute and grow the solutions offering. The following solutions offer mass market blockchain use cases targeting end-customers without Web3 know-how or setup. Blockchain Badges Blockchain Badges elevate your credentialing system with secure, immutable digital recognition on the blockchain. NFT Game Cube Engage your fans and get a new revenue stream for your Sports Club by combining NFTs and Machine Learning. ESG Credits Assists financial institutions and system integrators in delivering environmental impact reporting to their digital channels. X Bot A Telegram bot that helps community groups boost engagement on X (formerly Twitter) and track project's KOLs. BWS Developer Grants Recognizing the importance of building a vibrant developer ecosystem, we are excited to introduce the BWS Developer Grants—a program designed to incentivize developers to create tools and applications on top of our platform protocols, rewarding them for their contributions. The initiative will maintain a development fund to support growth efforts, focusing on fostering innovation within the BWS ecosystem. Bounty Payments Developers whose projects are selected for integration with BWS will receive bounty payments based on their complexity and impact. Recognition and Exposure Featured projects will be showcased on the BWS website, social media, and promotional channels, giving developers visibility and recognition within the blockchain community. Technical Support and Resources The BWS team will provide developers access to technical support, detailed documentation, and resources to streamline development. API Fees Once your application is published, you will receive a fee in $BWS tokens every time your APIs get called. Read the BWS White Paper to learn more about developer grants and $BWS tokenomics. Next Quick Start Last updated 5 days ago Was this helpful?

paragraphs: Blockchain Web Services documentation.

By leveraging the Blockchain Web Services API, developers can seamlessly integrate blockchain technology into their offerings, providing their target customers with blockchain innovative solutions without requiring Web3 expertise.
Easily and affordably store data on the blockchain while receiving a Certificate of Trust for enhanced transparency.
A single API call to save data to the blockchain without passing your wallet or managing the transaction fees.
Effortlessly upload images and JSON files to the IPFS network and use our IPFS gateway for reliable access.
This solution is designed to create NFTs easily but also to transfer the ownership to non-blockchain-experts users that will now be able to experience the NFT revolution too.

Blockchain Web Services is not just an API but a set of platform protocols and development practices to enable the community to contribute and grow the solutions offering.

The following solutions offer mass market blockchain use cases targeting end-customers without Web3 know-how or setup.
Blockchain Badges elevate your credentialing system with secure, immutable digital recognition on the blockchain.
Engage your fans and get a new revenue stream for your Sports Club by combining NFTs and Machine Learning.
Assists financial institutions and system integrators in delivering environmental impact reporting to their digital channels.
A Telegram bot that helps community groups boost engagement on X (formerly Twitter) and track project's KOLs.

Recognizing the importance of building a vibrant developer ecosystem, we are excited to introduce the BWS Developer Grants—a program designed to incentivize developers to create tools and applications on top of our platform protocols, rewarding them for their contributions.
The initiative will maintain a development fund to support growth efforts, focusing on fostering innovation within the BWS ecosystem.

pages.title: BWS.ESG.Credits | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: BWS.ESG.Credits helps financial institutions integrate ESG impact reporting into digital channels and investment reporting. Supports ICMA frameworks, custom taxonomies, and blockchain integration for secure, immutable storage. Prevents double-counting and ensures transparency for banks, investment advisors, institutional investors, and green asset issuers.
useCases: Provide ESG impact reporting in digital banking channels
Create detailed ESG impact reports for investors
Publish quality-assured impact data by certification bodies
Track green asset investments with blockchain transparency
Prevent double-counting of environmental credits
pages.fullContent: BWS API Docs Ctrl k Contact Us Create Account Sign In More Welcome! Quick Start Platform Fees API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits Solution Overview ESG Credits API TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Was this helpful? Copy Marketplace Solutions BWS.ESG.Credits For financial institutions that want to provide positive ESG impact reporting in their digital channels and investment reporting Author Status Contact Support BWS Ready https://www.greenassets.io/#contact-us BWS.ESG.Credits solution is designed to help financial institutions quickly integrate ESG impact benefits into their digital channels and investment reporting by leveraging investments in green assets. It serves banks, investment advisors, institutional investors, venture capitalists, and issuers of green assets by enabling the creation of detailed ESG impact reports for various stakeholders. Certification bodies can also use the API to publish quality-assured impact data. The solution supports ICMA frameworks and custom taxonomies, allows flexible impact calculations, and integrates seamlessly with blockchain for secure, immutable storage and certification of green investments, preventing double-counting and ensuring transparency. Previous Live Events Next Solution Overview Last updated 5 days ago Was this helpful?

paragraphs: For financial institutions that want to provide positive ESG impact reporting in their digital channels and investment reporting

It serves banks, investment advisors, institutional investors, venture capitalists, and issuers of green assets by enabling the creation of detailed ESG impact reports for various stakeholders. Certification bodies can also use the API to publish quality-assured impact data.

The solution supports ICMA frameworks and custom taxonomies, allows flexible impact calculations, and integrates seamlessly with blockchain for secure, immutable storage and certification of green investments, preventing double-counting and ensuring transparency.

pages.title: Platform Fees | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Explains BWS platform fee structure and blockchain transaction costs. Details how BWS handles network fees, token pool usage, and billing with $BWS tokens. Includes fees calculator, pricing examples, and explains free testnet transactions (100 free without card, 1000 with subscription). Uses 0.01 USD as minimum billable unit.
useCases: Calculate costs for creating 100 NFTs on Polygon
Test blockchain solutions free on Mumbai or Sepolia
Monitor monthly blockchain credit usage
Understand real-time USD to network token conversion
Fund developer community through $BWS token fees

implementationSteps.title: Test for Free
implementationSteps.description: Run 100 blockchain transactions free on testnet (Mumbai or Sepolia) without entering credit card. No $BWS tokens consumed.

implementationSteps.title: Subscribe and Scale
implementationSteps.description: Enter credit card details to run 1000 free testnet transactions and access mainnet with automatic fee handling.

implementationSteps.title: Monitor Usage

pages.fullContent: BWS API Docs Ctrl k Contact Us Create Account Sign In More Welcome! Quick Start Platform Fees Fees Calculator API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Fees Calculator Pricing Example How do I pay those Fees? Was this helpful? Copy Platform Fees We take care of everything. Calling blockchain smart contracts requires funds: “It is the fuel that allows it to operate”. Fees compensate miners for their computational efforts in processing and securing transactions on the network. They are fundamental to the blockchain's sustainability, security, and efficiency, ensuring the network remains robust and decentralized. Blockchain Web Services (BWS) aims to transform the blockchain market by making innovative solutions accessible to a broad audience, including those without technical or Web3 experience. Fees Calculator Interacting with blockchain requires paying fees, so it's important to understand how Blockchain Web Services manages those fees to offer our customers the best user experience. In any scenario, we handle all the blockchain complexities. You interact with the blockchain(s) we support using our simplified API, and you don't need to worry about anything other than naming the blockchain you want to use. If you haven't entered your credit card, you can test our blockchain solutions for free using the Mumbai or Sepolia test networks. You can run 100 blockchain transactions for free. We use our token pools to pay network fees, and you are not charged. Using test networks does not consume $BWS tokens. Once you move into subscription mode by entering your credit card details, You can run 1000 testnet transactions for free. When running on main networks, we do real-time trading, convert US dollars to the required network token, and pay the fees for you. You will then be charged for those fees on your next bill, using 0.01 USD as the minimum billable unit. Every solution requires $BWS tokens to execute and fund the developer's community and platform maintenance. Please read the platform White Paper to know more about the $BWS token and its tokenomics. Pricing Example Suppose you subscribe to Blockchain Web Services and want to create 100 new NFTs on the Polygon blockchain using BWS.NFT.zK to create the NFTs, and BWS.IPFS.Upload to save your images to IPFS. Creating those 100 NFTs will cost you: Copy 100 IPFS Images, included = 0 USD 100 NFTs x 0.02 Network Fee = 2 USD Your next bill will show an extra 2 USD to your monthly plan. How do I pay those Fees? To check your current monthly cost, go to the Billing menu and check your credit usage. BLOCKCHAIN CREDIT FEE We use the Blockchain Credit Fee as the minimum billable unit, 0.01 USD. If, for example, you spend 2 USD creating NFTs, we will add 200 blockchain credit fee units to your next bill. Credits Usage balance. Previous Quick Start Next API How Tos Last updated 5 days ago Was this helpful?

In any scenario, we handle all the blockchain complexities. You interact with the blockchain(s) we support using our simplified API, and you don't need to worry about anything other than naming the blockchain you want to use.
If you haven't entered your credit card, you can test our blockchain solutions for free using the Mumbai or Sepolia test networks.

Once you move into subscription mode by entering your credit card details,

When running on main networks, we do real-time trading, convert US dollars to the required network token, and pay the fees for you. You will then be charged for those fees on your next bill, using 0.01 USD as the minimum billable unit.
Creating those 100 NFTs will cost you:
Your next bill will show an extra 2 USD to your monthly plan.
To check your current monthly cost, go to the Billing menu and check your credit usage.

pages.title: Quick Start | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: Quick start tutorial demonstrating how to write 'Hello World!' to Matchain blockchain in one API call. Walks through getting API key, making first BWS API request using BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution, and checking job status. Shows complete code examples in cURL, JavaScript, and Python for both call and fetch operations.

codeExamples.description: Write 'Hello World!' to Matchain blockchain using BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution without managing wallets or network fees
JavaScript example for calling BWS API to insert data into blockchain
Fetch blockchain job status and results using jobId returned from previous call

Store simple key-value data on Matchain blockchain

Test blockchain integration with minimal code

implementationSteps.title: Get Your API Key
implementationSteps.description: Obtain your API key for authentication as all requests require it to avoid errors.

implementationSteps.title: Make First API Call
implementationSteps.description: POST to /v1/smart-contracts/call with BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution to write 'Hello World!' to Matchain. Receive jobId in response.

implementationSteps.title: Check Job Status

pages.fullContent: BWS API Docs Ctrl k Contact Us Create Account Sign In More Welcome! Quick Start Platform Fees API How Tos Certificate Of Trust Media Assets PLATFORM APIs BWS.IPFS.Upload BWS.Blockchain.Save BWS.Blockchain.Hash BWS.NFT.zK Marketplace Solutions BWS.Blockchain.Badges BWS.NFT.GameCube BWS.ESG.Credits TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT Powered by GitBook On this page Get your API key Your First BWS API Request Write "Hello World!" to Matchain blockchain. Check for Status Fetch for the blockchain job status and results. Was this helpful? Copy Quick Start Writing "Hello World!" to the blockchain in just one call! Get your API key Your API requests should be authenticated using your API key (any request that doesn't include an API key will return an error). Learn how to Get your API Key . Your First BWS API Request We're going to use the BWS.Blockchain.Hash solution to save a message to the blockchain. Write "Hello World!" to Matchain blockchain. POST https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/call Let's write "Hello World!" to the Matchain blockchain network without managing network fees or Web3 wallets by calling a regular Web2 API. Request Body Name Type Description solution * string BWS.Blockchain.Hash version * number 1 network * string matchain operation * string insert parameters * JSON { key: "mykey", value: "Hello World!" } Please copy & Paste one of the following code snippets and run it (remember to use your API Key). curl Javascript Phyton Copy curl --location 'https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/call' \ --header 'X-Api-Key: API-KEY' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }' Copy var settings = { "url": "https://api.bws.ninja/v1/call", "method": "POST", "timeout": 0, "headers": { "X-Api-Key": "API-KEY", "Content-Type": "application/json" }, "data": JSON.stringify({ "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }), }; $.ajax(settings).done(function (response) { console.log(response); }); Copy import http.client import json conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.bws.ninja") payload = json.dumps({ "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }) headers = { 'X-Api-Key': 'API-KEY', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } conn.request("POST", "/v1/call", payload, headers) res = conn.getresponse() data = res.read() print(data.decode("utf-8")) If executed correctly, check for jobId in the response body part. We will use it to verify that the blockchain operation has been completed correctly and to receive the blockchain transaction receipt and Certificate of Trust . API Call response Copy { "statusCode": 200, "statusMessage": "", "info": { "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4972-8aca-51d06f69f25e" } } Check for Status To check for job completion and results, use the jobId you got from the previous call. Please note that interacting with blockchain(s) is asynchronous, so it may take some time for the operation to finish and for the blockchain receipt to be received. Fetch for the blockchain job status and results. POST https://api.bws.ninja/v1/smart-contracts/fetch Using the previous call response jobId we fetch the blockchain job started previously. Request Body Name Type Description jobId * String (use previously returned jobId, as for example 59d0f46b-0b58-4972-8aca-51d06f69f25e) Copy & Paste one of the following code snippets and run it (remember to use your own API Key). curl Javascript Phyton Copy curl --location 'https://api.bws.ninja/v1/fetch' \ --header 'X-Api-Key: API-KEY' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4972-8aca-51d06f69f25e" }' Copy var settings = { "url": "https://api.bws.ninja/v1/fetch", "method": "POST", "timeout": 0, "headers": { "X-Api-Key": "API-KEY", "Content-Type": "application/json" }, "data": JSON.stringify({ "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4512-8aca-51d06f69f25e" }), }; $.ajax(settings).done(function (response) { console.log(response); }); Copy import http.client import json conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.bws.ninja") payload = json.dumps({ "jobId": "59d0f46b-0b58-4512-8aca-51d06f69f25e" }) headers = { 'X-Api-Key': 'API-KEY', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } conn.request("POST", "/v1/fetch", payload, headers) res = conn.getresponse() data = res.read() print(data.decode("utf-8")) You should receive a response indicating the completed job and the related blockchain receipt and certificate. Fetch API Call Response Copy { "statusCode": 200, "info": { "status": { "Value": "completed" }, "request": { "solution": "BWS.Blockchain.Hash", "version": 1, "network": "matchain", "operation": "insert", "parameters": { "key": "timestamp: 1736418591440", "value": "Hola" } }, "hash": "0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8", "txnUrl": "https://matchscan.io/tx/0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8", "certificateOfTrust": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/bws-backoffice-website-infra-prod/tx/matchain/0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8.pdf", "certificateOfTrustJPG": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/bws-backoffice-website-infra-prod/tx/matchain/0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8.jpg", "certificateOfTrustUrl": "https://prod.bws.ninja/tx.html?t=0xd5c51886e57b1b16e59bd866910f2c689728f9e4025a4abc14bf7b07ae21dcc8", "type": { "value": "blockchain-job" }, "timestampInMillis": 1736418605359, "id": "a89bf8bf-392b-4cc3-8ded-7dbe9d43c341" } } Congratulations! In just one call, you used BWS to save data into the Web3 blockchain ecosystem. Previous Welcome! Next Platform Fees Last updated 5 days ago Was this helpful?

pages.title: BWS.Blockchain.Save | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: BWS.Blockchain.Save provides an efficient way to store immutable data on the blockchain. This platform API enables developers to save permanent records on-chain with simple integration. The service is designed for applications requiring tamper-proof data storage with blockchain verification.
useCases: Store permanent business records on blockchain
Create immutable audit trails for compliance
Archive legal documents with blockchain verification
Save transaction records that cannot be altered
Maintain tamper-proof historical data

pages.title: BWS.IPFS.Upload | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: BWS.IPFS.Upload enables easy uploading of images, PDF files, and JSON documents to the InterPlanetary File System (IPFS). This platform API simplifies decentralized file storage for blockchain applications. The service supports multiple file formats commonly used in Web3 and NFT projects.
useCases: Upload NFT images to IPFS for decentralized storage
Store NFT metadata JSON files on IPFS
Archive PDF documents in distributed storage
Host decentralized application assets
Create permanent links to media files for blockchain projects

pages.title: BWS.NFT.zK | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: BWS.NFT.zK allows developers to manage NFTs with zero complexities through a simplified API. The platform handles NFT creation, operations, and attribute management without requiring deep blockchain expertise. It includes support for NFT traits and characteristics configuration.
useCases: Create NFT collections without blockchain complexity
Manage NFT traits and attributes programmatically
Launch NFT projects with simplified API integration
Build NFT marketplaces with easy-to-use backend
Generate dynamic NFTs with customizable properties

pages.title: X BOT | BWS API Docs
pages.summary: X Bot is a Telegram-based analytics platform that provides accurate Twitter/X engagement metrics using the official X API. It helps crypto projects measure community impact and KOL profitability while enabling investors to discover projects with authentic community traction. The bot only processes publicly available post content and does not access private user data or post on behalf of users.
useCases: Measure crypto project community engagement on Twitter/X
Track KOL performance and profitability metrics
Verify authentic community traction for investment decisions
Analyze Twitter campaign effectiveness for crypto projects
Showcase verifiable social media performance for influencers

Copy TELEGRAM BOTS X BOT X Bot is a Telegram-based analytics platform that provides accurate X (Twitter) engagement metrics using the official X API. It helps crypto projects measure community impact and KOL profitability, enables KOL teams to showcase verifiable performance, and allows investors to discover projects with authentic community traction. Built on the official X API to ensure accuracy and reliability in every metric. X Bot does not post or interact on X and does not access private user data—only publicly available post content is processed. Previous Users Next Overview Last updated 5 days ago Was this helpful?

It helps crypto projects measure community impact and KOL profitability, enables KOL teams to showcase verifiable performance, and allows investors to discover projects with authentic community traction.
Built on the official X API to ensure accuracy and reliability in every metric.
